sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ فِي مَقْهًى صَغِيرٍ فِي حَيٍّ شَعْبِيٍّ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo sam u mali kafić u narodnom kvartu blizu hotela.
sentences.translationEn: I sat in a small café in a popular neighbourhood near the hotel.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْتُ فِنْجَانَ قَهْوَةٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ مَعَ قِطْعَةِ حَلْوَى.
sentences.translation: Naručio sam šalicu arapske kafe uz komad slatkiša.
sentences.translationEn: I ordered a cup of Arabic coffee with a piece of sweet pastry.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ بِجَانِبِي رَجُلٌ كَبِيرٌ وَبَدَأَ يُحَدِّثُنِي عَنِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pored mene je sjeo stariji čovjek i počeo mi pričati o gradu.
sentences.translationEn: An older man sat beside me and started telling me about the city.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَنِي عَنْ أَجْمَلِ الْأَمَاكِنِ الَّتِي يَجِبُ أَنْ أَزُورَهَا.
sentences.translation: Ispričao mi je o najljepšim mjestima koja trebam posjetiti.
sentences.translationEn: He told me about the most beautiful places I should visit.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرْتُهُ وَكَتَبْتُ اسْمَ الْأَمَاكِنِ فِي دَفْتَرِي الصَّغِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Zahvalio sam mu se i zapisao nazive mjesta u svoju malu bilježnicu.
sentences.translationEn: I thanked him and wrote the names of the places in my little notebook.
